name: God Speed Transportation
districts_or_customers: Detroit Public Schools Community District (DPSCD) - awarded first government contract summer 2022 for school-age student transport; also serves elderly/disabled NEMT clients
recent_news: Awarded first City of Detroit/DPSCD contract in summer 2022 to transport school-age students; originally founded 2004 to provide school transportation, later expanded into NEMT.
fit_notes: Very small NEMT/special-needs operator with a single DPSCD contract; sub-scale for a Summit tuck-in but could be a tuck-in for an existing Detroit-area Summit operation if NEMT/SPED capacity is needed. Independent family-style ownership.

name: 5280 Limousine
owner_or_parent: likely rolled into Mountain Top Limo / Star Transportation Group (per 301 redirect of 5280limodenver.com to mtlimoservices.com)
districts_or_customers: No evidence of school district or SPED contracts; consumer/corporate limo market in Colorado Springs/Denver
recent_news: 5280limodenver.com now 301-redirects to mtlimoservices.com, suggesting the brand has been absorbed or discontinued; no school transportation footprint found.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator - luxury limo/sedan service. Domain redirect suggests it has already been consolidated. Not a tuck-in target for Summit.

name: Caspian Transportation
principals: 'Shawn' referenced as owner in customer testimonial (full name not disclosed)
districts_or_customers: Southern NH and MA NEMT clients - IDD population, dialysis, doctor's appointments, hospital discharges; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; 4.9-star Birdeye rating across ~295 reviews suggests stable small operator. Domain references both Nashua NH and Charlotte NC, suggesting limited multi-region presence.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/wheelchair operator with no apparent school-district contracts; not a school-bus tuck-in. Too small and out-of-scope for Summit unless they layer in SPED routing in NH.

name: Emmanuel Medical Transport LLC
districts_or_customers: NEMT clients across North Carolina (Cumberland County area); NPI #1891413191 registered as Transportation Network Company; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: Operates as 'Let Us Drive' brand; no M&A or growth news identified. SAFER lists related Emmanuel Transport LLC (USDOT 3528639).
fit_notes: Pure NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor. Sub-scale and out-of-scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Stars Limo Inc
districts_or_customers: Consumer/event limousine market in Downey/LA County area; no school district or SPED contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or news identified. Listed website star-limo.com appears to be a different operator (Star Transportation Group / Robert DeLucia Sr.); Stars Limo Inc of Downey appears to be a small independent limo company with no confirmed school-bus footprint.
website: https://www.star-limo.com/ (listed; may not be this entity)
fit_notes: Limousine/party transport operator, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Out-of-scope for Summit tuck-in.
